title: sambucus nigra f. laciniata
intro: Sambucus nigra f. laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved elder or cut-leaved black elder, is a shrub-like plant that is a variant of the black elder tree, characterized by its distinctive cut or lobed leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as colds, flu, and bronchitis due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sambucus nigra f. laciniata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Sambucus nigra f. laciniata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and syrups, and can also be consumed in capsule or raw form.
